# HomeBase Pro

> All-in-one platform for home service professionals: AI-powered booking, scheduling, invoicing, and payments. Also a marketplace where homeowners book vetted local pros.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview — AI booking, payments, automation, and growth tools for home service pros.
- [Marketplace](/marketplace): Browse verified home service professionals.
- [AI Booking](/ai-booking): Let AI match you with the right pro and book instantly.
- [Blog](/blog): Practical guides for independent home-service providers.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about HomeBase, pricing, payments, and accounts.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How HomeBase collects and uses data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of HomeBase.

## Blog posts

- [Getting Started on HomeBase](/blog/getting-started-on-homebase): Step-by-step guide to launching your HomeBase business profile.
- [Setting Your Rates](/blog/setting-your-rates): Pricing framework for independent providers.
- [Winning 5-Star Reviews](/blog/winning-5-star-reviews): How to earn reviews that close future bookings.
- [Photographing Your Work](/blog/photographing-your-work): Capture portfolio photos that convert.
- [Business Insurance Guide](/blog/business-insurance-guide): What coverage independent pros actually need.
- [Understanding Your Stats](/blog/understanding-your-stats): Read your HomeBase analytics like a pro.
- [Managing Your Schedule](/blog/managing-your-schedule): Build a calendar that protects your time.
- [Getting Paid Faster](/blog/getting-paid-faster): Reduce invoice lag with HomeBase Pay.
